hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次；【FINANCE】美联储投票维持利率稳定，指出伊朗战争的“不确定”影响；【CRYPTO】STRC 的天才和危险：Strategy 的新融资模式如何改变以使其不会崩溃。

items.title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
items.summary: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
items.summary_zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

items.title: Fed votes to hold rates steady, notes 'uncertain' impacts from Iran war
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its decision in interest rates.
items.title_zh: 美联储投票维持利率稳定，指出伊朗战争的“不确定”影响
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了利率决定。

items.title: The genius and the danger of STRC: How Strategy’s new funding model bends so it doesn't break
items.summary: Strategy's STRC has bitcoin a major bitcoin accumulation tool, but analysts warn the risks aren't as clear as the marketing makes them out to be.
items.title_zh: STRC 的天才和危险：Strategy 的新融资模式如何改变以使其不会崩溃
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的 STRC 将比特币视为主要的比特币积累工具，但分析师警告称，风险并不像营销所描述的那么明显。

items.title: Gold falters as macro pressures build, bitcoin holds liquidity trend
items.summary: Rising real rates and inflation risks weigh on gold, while bitcoin continues to consolidate.
items.title_zh: 宏观压力加剧，黄金走软，比特币保持流动性趋势
items.summary_zh: 实际利率上升和通胀风险令黄金承压，而比特币则继续盘整。

items.title: Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year
items.summary: Waller said in a CNBC interview that recent developments require a more conservative approach.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事沃勒敦促目前保持谨慎，称今年晚些时候可能降息
items.summary_zh: 沃勒在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，最近的事态发展需要采取更加保守的做法。

items.title: On Beirut’s Waterfront, Loss Meets Life, and Luxury, Amid War
items.summary: Thousands displaced by Israeli strikes on Lebanon’s capital now shelter along the promenade hugging the Mediterranean Sea. They share it with joggers, cyclists and dog walkers, alongside dizzying displays of wealth.
items.title_zh: 在贝鲁特海滨，战争中的损失与生活和奢华相遇
items.summary_zh: 因以色列对黎巴嫩首都的袭击而流离失所的数千人现在沿着地中海沿岸的海滨长廊避难。他们与慢跑者、骑自行车者和遛狗者分享这些，同时还炫耀令人眼花缭乱的财富。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Is Defiant After Trump Threatens Power Plants
items.summary: Iran dismissed President Trump’s ultimatum to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz, saying it would consider electric plants and water facilities “legitimate targets” if its electrical grid were struck.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普威胁发电厂后，德黑兰表现得目中无人
items.summary_zh: 伊朗驳回了特朗普总统关于全面重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的最后通牒，称如果其电网遭到袭击，它将把发电厂和供水设施视为“合法目标”。

items.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops 7.8% as miner exodus accelerates amid AI pivot
items.summary: Difficulty is now nearly 10% below where it started the year, despite a sharp 14.7% rebound in February after weather-related disruptions subsided.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能转向，矿工外流加速，比特币挖矿难度下降 7.8%
items.summary_zh: 尽管在天气相关干扰消退后，2 月份难度大幅反弹 14.7%，但目前难度仍比年初低了近 10%。

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.
items.title_zh: 为员工提供有关薪酬的见解
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示，美国人每天向 ChatGPT 发送近 300 万条消息，询问薪酬和收入，这有助于缩小工资信息差距。

items.title: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce on ETFs: 'We want to work with people on new products'
items.summary: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce indicates an openness to work with Wall Street on fresh exchange-traded fund products tied to cryptocurrencies and tokenization.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Hester Peirce 谈 ETF：“我们希望与人们合作开发新产品”
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Hester Peirce 表示愿意与华尔街合作开发与加密货币和代币化相关的新交易所交易基金产品。

items.title: Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. There's a worrying reason behind it
items.summary: After major rallies, metals were under pressure on Thursday as rising oil prices increased both inflation and growth worries.
items.title_zh: 铜与黄金一起遭遇大宗商品抛售。背后有一个令人担忧的原因
items.summary_zh: 在大幅上涨后，周四金属面临压力，因为油价上涨加剧了通胀和增长担忧。

items.title: Here are the five key takeaways from this week's Fed meeting
items.summary: While no one expected the Fed to cut — much less hike — at this meeting, the market always looks for clues about what's next.
items.title_zh: 以下是本周美联储会议的五个关键要点
items.summary_zh: 尽管没有人预计美联储会在这次会议上降息——更不用说加息了，但市场总是在寻找有关下一步走势的线索。

items.title: Here's what changed in the new Fed statement
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in January.
items.title_zh: 这是新的美联储声明中的变化
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 1 月份上次政策制定会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase taps A'ja Wilson, Tom Brady for new athlete wealth management push
items.summary: JPMorgan's move reflects growing competition among banks and wealth managers to serve athletes, who are increasingly becoming entrepreneurs and investors.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通聘请阿贾·威尔逊和汤姆·布雷迪推动新运动员财富管理
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的此举反映了银行和财富管理机构之间为服务运动员而日益激烈的竞争，而运动员正日益成为企业家和投资者。

items.title: Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and properties
items.summary: The violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike.
items.title_zh: 以色列定居者以被占领的约旦河西岸的巴勒斯坦村庄为目标，袭击人员和财产
items.summary_zh: 据报道，18 岁的定居者耶胡达·谢尔曼 (Yehuda Sherman) 在骑四轮摩托车时被巴勒斯坦人驾驶的车辆撞死，随后发生了暴力事件。

items.title: Israel to expand ground and air attacks against Hezbollah in Lebanon
items.summary: There are fears in Lebanon that Israel is preparing for a large-scale ground invasion.
items.title_zh: 以色列扩大对黎巴嫩真主党的地面和空中攻击
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩担心以色列正在准备大规模地面入侵。

items.title: Attack on a Sudan Hospital Kills Dozens, Head of W.H.O. Says
items.summary: The group’s director general said 13 children were among those killed in the latest violence in the Darfur region, and he decried the targeting of health care facilities in the civil war.
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人：苏丹一家医院遇袭造成数十人死亡说
items.summary_zh: 该组织总干事表示，在达尔富尔地区最近的暴力事件中，有 13 名儿童丧生，他谴责内战中针对医疗保健设施的行为。

items.title: Ethereum faces make-or-break moment in high-stakes balancing act as scaling, quantum and AI pressures mount
items.summary: While upgrades have improved efficiency and lowered costs, the ecosystem faces deeper structural questions around fragmentation, security, and purpose, even as it continues prioritizing base-layer scaling.
items.title_zh: 随着扩展、量子和人工智能压力的增加，以太坊在高风险平衡行为中面临着成败时刻
items.summary_zh: 虽然升级提高了效率并降低了成本，但生态系统面临着围绕碎片化、安全性和用途的更深层次的结构性问题，即使它继续优先考虑基础层扩展。

items.title: Bitcoin miners are losing $19,000 on every BTC produced as difficulty drops 7.8%
items.summary: The average production cost was sitting at $88,000 per bitcoin in mid-March, according to Checkonchain's difficulty regression model.
items.title_zh: 随着难度下降 7.8%，比特币矿工每生产 1 个 BTC 就会损失 19,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 根据 Checkonchain 的难度回归模型，3 月中旬每个比特币的平均生产成本为 88,000 美元。

items.title: NYSE exchanges complete industry-wide removal of crypto ETF options caps
items.summary: The changes mean crypto ETF options are now treated identically to other commodity-based ETF options at every major exchange in the U.S.
items.title_zh: 纽约证券交易所完成全行业取消加密 ETF 期权上限
items.summary_zh: 这些变化意味着加密 ETF 期权现在在美国各大交易所受到与其他基于商品的 ETF 期权相同的待遇。

items.title: Brazil’s new finance minister shelves crypto tax consultation amid election pivot: Reuters
items.summary: The consultation was expected to address the tax treatment of crypto transactions following central bank regulations finalized last year.
items.title_zh: 巴西新任财政部长因选举转向搁置加密货币税收咨询：路透社
items.summary_zh: 继去年央行法规最终确定后，此次磋商预计将解决加密货币交易的税务处理问题。

items.title: Grayscale files for HYPE ETF tracking largest onchain perps DEX Hyperliquid
items.summary: According to the filing on Friday, the Grayscale HYPE ETF would trade on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol GHYP if approved.
items.title_zh: HYPE ETF 的灰度文件跟踪最大的链上 Perps DEX Hyperliquid
items.summary_zh: 根据周五提交的文件，如果获得批准，Grayscale HYPE ETF 将在纳斯达克交易，股票代码为 GHYP。

items.title: Lawmakers reach breakthrough with ‘agreement in principle’ over stablecoin yield in sweeping crypto bill
items.summary: Key negotiators in advancing sweeping crypto legislation have reached an "agreement in principle" around the treatment of stablecoin yield.
items.title_zh: 立法者在全面的加密货币法案中就稳定币收益率达成“原则协议”取得突破
items.summary_zh: 推进全面加密货币立法的主要谈判者已就稳定币收益率的处理达成了“原则协议”。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #45.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：海妖 (SIREN)

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #94.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 94。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
items.summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.
items.title_zh: 生成式人工智能改进了无线视觉系统，可以穿透障碍物
items.summary_zh: 借助这项新技术，机器人可以使用反射的 Wi-Fi 信号更准确地检测隐藏物体或了解室内场景。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Monday, 02/23/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Evaluating Reversal Potential in Niche Alternative ETFs [Quantpedia] Alternative ETFs sit at an unusual intersection of pub
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日星期一 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！评估利基另类 ETF 的逆转潜力 [Quantpedia] 另类 ETF 位于酒吧的一个不寻常的交叉点

items.title: XRP falls 3% as breakdown below $1.44 and bitcoin weakness caps recovery
items.summary: Traders are watching support near $1.40 as repeated failures below $1.60 reinforce broader downtrend.
items.title_zh: XRP 跌破 1.44 美元下跌 3%，比特币疲软限制复苏
items.summary_zh: 交易员正在关注 1.40 美元附近的支撑位，因为反复跌破 1.60 美元会强化更广泛的下行趋势。

items.title: Bitcoin drops below $69,200 as Trump gives 48-hour ultimatum on Iran power plants
items.summary: BTC fell 2.2% as $299 million in liquidations hit crypto markets, with long positions accounting for 85% of the damage.
items.title_zh: 特朗普对伊朗发电厂发出 48 小时最后通牒，比特币跌破 69,200 美元
items.summary_zh: 加密市场遭受 2.99 亿美元的清算，比特币下跌 2.2%，其中多头头寸造成的损失占 85%。

items.title: Bitcoin options signal extreme fear as downside protection premium hits new all-time high, says VanEck
items.summary: Despite stabilizing spot prices, investors remain defensive, with leveraged speculation cooling and realized volatility dropping from 80 to 50, suggesting a cautious market sentiment.
items.title_zh: VanEck 表示，随着下行保护溢价创下历史新高，比特币期权发出了极度恐惧的信号
items.summary_zh: 尽管现货价格趋于稳定，但投资者仍保持防御态度，杠杆投机降温，实际波动率从 80 降至 50，表明市场情绪谨慎。

items.title: CFTC staff details how crypto firms can use digital assets as derivatives collateral in new FAQ
items.summary: The FAQ aligns the CFTC's framework with the SEC's recent haircut guidance, setting a 20% charge for bitcoin and ether and 2% for payment stablecoins.
items.title_zh: CFTC 工作人员在新的常见问题解答中详细介绍了加密货币公司如何使用数字资产作为衍生品抵押品
items.summary_zh: 该常见问题解答使 CFTC 的框架与 SEC 最近的削减指导保持一致，对比特币和以太币设定了 20% 的费用，对支付稳定币设定了 2% 的费用。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: A better method for identifying overconfident large language models
items.summary: This new metric for measuring uncertainty could flag hallucinations and help users know whether to trust an AI model.
items.title_zh: 识别过度自信的大型语言模型的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 这种测量不确定性的新指标可以标记幻觉，并帮助用户知道是否信任人工智能模型。

items.title: MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab seed to signal: Amplifying early-career faculty impact
items.summary: Academia-industry relationship is an early-stage accelerator, supporting professional progress and research.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM Watson AI 实验室种子信号：扩大早期职业教师的影响力
items.summary_zh: 学术界与工业界的关系是早期加速器，支持专业进步和研究。

items.title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
items.summary: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
items.title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
items.summary_zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

items.title: OpenClaw demand in China is driving up the price of used MacBooks
items.summary: People in China are rushing to buy preowned computers to try OpenClaw with demand for MacBooks particularly high, according to one reseller.
items.title_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 需求正在推高二手 MacBook 的价格
items.summary_zh: 据一位经销商称，中国人正争相购买二手电脑来尝试 OpenClaw，其中对 MacBook 的需求特别高。

items.title: France's Socialists hold onto power in major cities in election boost for mainstream
items.summary: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
items.title_zh: 法国社会党在主要城市继续掌权，以推动主流选举
items.summary_zh: 巴黎和马赛的地方选举由社会党掌控，民族主义右翼在尼斯和某些城镇获胜。

items.title: Kenyans fighting illegally for Russia in Ukraine to be granted amnesty
items.summary: It is illegal for Kenyans to serve in foreign armies and can carry a sentence of up to 10 years in jail.
items.title_zh: 在乌克兰为俄罗斯非法作战的肯尼亚人将获得大赦
items.summary_zh: 肯尼亚人在外国军队服役是违法的，最高可判处 10 年监禁。

items.title: National blackout hits Cuba for second time in a week
items.summary: Another total failure of its power grid underlines Cuba's hardship under a US-imposed fuel blockade.
items.title_zh: 古巴一周内第二次全国停电
items.summary_zh: 其电网再次全面瘫痪，凸显了古巴在美国实施的燃料封锁下所面临的困难。

items.title: Iranian missiles injure 180 in towns near Israeli nuclear site
items.summary: Israel is investigating how ballistic missiles got through the country's sophisticated air defences.
items.title_zh: 伊朗导弹造成以色列核设施附近城镇180人受伤
items.summary_zh: 以色列正在调查弹道导弹如何突破该国先进的防空系统。

items.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist airport security as DHS shutdown continues
items.summary: Travellers have faced hours-long waits at airports around the country as a partial government shutdown has left TSA agents without pay.
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，随着国土安全部继续关闭，ICE 特工将协助机场安全
items.summary_zh: 由于政府部分关闭导致美国运输安全管理局（TSA）工作人员没有工资，旅客在全国各地的机场面临长达数小时的等待。

items.title: Hawaii storms have caused $1bn in damage, governor says
items.summary: The full scale of the damages to roads and other infrastructure from rain and flooding in the state must still be assessed, Gov Josh Green says.
items.title_zh: 州长称夏威夷风暴已造成 10 亿美元损失
items.summary_zh: 州长乔什·格林表示，该州因降雨和洪水而对道路和其他基础设施造成的损害仍需全面评估。

items.title: 'We cannot be in peace', say Guthrie family as they renew appeal over missing mother
items.summary: A seven-week nationwide search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of TV anchor Savannah Guthrie has not identified any suspects.
items.title_zh: 格思里一家再次呼吁失踪母亲称“我们无法平静”
items.summary_zh: 电视主播萨凡纳·格思里 (Savannah Guthrie) 的母亲、84 岁的南希·格思里 (Nancy Guthrie) 在全国范围内进行了为期七周的搜寻，但尚未发现任何嫌疑人。

items.title: Sudan drone attack on key hospital killed 64 people during Eid, WHO says
items.summary: The strike killed 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses and a doctor, according to the WHO head.
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织称，苏丹无人机在开斋节期间袭击了一家主要医院，造成 64 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据世界卫生组织负责人称，此次罢工造成 64 人死亡，其中包括 13 名儿童、两名护士和一名医生。

items.title: French Far Right Falls Short of Statement Win in Yardstick Local Races
items.summary: France’s far right hoped for major gains in Sunday’s municipal elections, a key bellwether moment before a presidential election next year. Its results were mixed.
items.title_zh: 法国极右翼在当地竞选中未能赢得声明
items.summary_zh: 法国极右翼希望在周日的市政选举中取得重大进展，这是明年总统选举前的关键时刻。其结果好坏参半。

items.title: Israel’s Missile Defense Under Scrutiny After Iranian Attack
items.summary: Two missiles landed hours apart, wreaking havoc in two towns near a heavily guarded nuclear site in the Negev Desert.
items.title_zh: 伊朗袭击后，以色列的导弹防御系统受到密切关注
items.summary_zh: 两枚导弹相隔数小时降落，对内盖夫沙漠戒备森严的核设施附近的两个城镇造成严重破坏。

items.title: The Billionaire Funding France’s Far Right
items.summary: Pierre-Édouard Stérin is financing projects to make France less Muslim, more Catholic and more capitalist. He says his program has trained thousands running for municipal office on Sunday.
items.title_zh: 亿万富翁资助法国极右翼
items.summary_zh: 皮埃尔·爱德华·斯特林正在资助一些项目，使法国的穆斯林化程度降低，天主教徒化程度提高，资本主义化程度提高。他说，他的项目周日已经培训了数千人竞选市政府官员。

items.title: Italy’s Leader Wants to Change the Constitution. Italians Don’t Get It.
items.summary: Voting starts Sunday on a referendum to overhaul Italy’s judiciary. Many people don’t understand the complex proposal — and it could hurt Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni.
items.title_zh: 意大利领导人想要修改宪法。意大利人不明白。
items.summary_zh: 意大利司法机构改革公投将于周日开始。许多人不理解这个复杂的提议——这可能会伤害总理乔治亚·梅洛尼(Giorgia Meloni)。

items.title: Terror Attacks Haunted This Brussels Community. Now It’s Trying to Move On.
items.summary: Molenbeek was branded a hotbed of radicalization after terrorists hit Brussels and Paris a decade ago, but new challenges show that reinvention doesn’t come easy.
items.title_zh: 恐怖袭击困扰着布鲁塞尔社区。现在它正试图继续前进。
items.summary_zh: 十年前恐怖分子袭击布鲁塞尔和巴黎后，莫伦贝克被称为激进主义的温床，但新的挑战表明，重塑并不容易。

items.title: Election in Slovenia Is a Near Tie
items.summary: The center-left and the right-wing populists got about equal support. The next government will be led by the one who can build a coalition with smaller parties.
items.title_zh: 斯洛文尼亚大选势均力敌
items.summary_zh: 中左翼和右翼民粹主义者获得的支持大致相同。下一届政府将由能够与较小政党建立联盟的人领导。

items.title: With Fire and Song, Kurds in Turkey Hail the Start of Spring
items.summary: The Newroz holiday comes at a critical time, as Kurds in Turkey push for peace while their brethren in Syria and Iran fear further conflict.
items.title_zh: 土耳其库尔德人用火焰和歌声迎接春天的到来
items.summary_zh: 纽鲁兹节假期正值关键时刻，土耳其的库尔德人推动和平，而叙利亚和伊朗的兄弟则担心进一步的冲突。

items.title: If one trader can force the outcome of a prediction market, it shouldn’t be tradable
items.summary: By hosting manipulable contracts, prediction markets swap their long-term credibility for short-term engagement.
items.title_zh: 如果一个交易者可以强制预测市场的结果，那么它就不应该被交易
items.summary_zh: 通过托管可操纵的合约，预测市场将其长期可信度换成了短期参与。

items.title: The SEC explains how it's viewing a crypto security: State of Crypto
items.summary: Joint SEC-CFTC interpretive guidance outlines how the agencies will determine whether a cryptocurrency is a security.
items.title_zh: SEC 解释其如何看待加密货币证券：加密货币现状
items.summary_zh: SEC-CFTC 联合解释指南概述了各机构将如何确定加密货币是否为证券。

items.title: Crypto firms cut hundreds of jobs in weeks, blaming weak markets, strong AI
items.summary: A wave of crypto job cuts in early 2026 exposes the gap between two convenient narratives: macro headwinds and AI transformation.
items.title_zh: 加密货币公司在几周内裁员数百人，归咎于市场疲软和强大的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 2026 年初的一波加密货币裁员潮暴露了两种简单叙述之间的差距：宏观逆风和人工智能转型。

items.title: The Funding: Is a token-to-equity shift emerging in crypto?
items.summary: Across Protocol’s recent temp check proposal raises a bigger question about the future of DAOs and tokens in crypto.
items.title_zh: 资金：加密货币领域是否正在出现代币到股权的转变？
items.summary_zh: Across Protocol 最近的临时检查提案对 DAO 和加密代币的未来提出了一个更大的问题。

items.title: CoinDCX co-founders arrested by Indian police for alleged fraud deny wrongdoing, blame impersonation scheme: reports
items.summary: CoinDCX called the report "false" and said the fraud was carried out through a copycat website by impersonators, not through its platform.
items.title_zh: CoinDCX 联合创始人因涉嫌欺诈被印度警方逮捕，否认有不当行为，指责冒充计划：报告
items.summary_zh: CoinDCX 称该报告“虚假”，并表示欺诈行为是由冒充者通过山寨网站而非其平台进行的。

items.title: Resolv’s USR stablecoin depegs after attacker mints 80 million unbacked tokens, extracts roughly $25 million
items.summary: Analysts traced the flaw to a privileged minting role controlled by a single externally owned account with no mint limits or oracle checks.
items.title_zh: 在攻击者铸造 8000 万个无支持代币后，Resolv 的 USR 稳定币脱钩，提取了约 2500 万美元
items.summary_zh: 分析师将该缺陷追溯到由单个外部账户控制的特权铸币角色，没有铸币限制或预言机检查。

items.title: ‘Replacing humans is not close’: BlockSec challenges EVMBench on AI auditing
items.summary: “The real question is not ‘Can AI replace humans?’ but ‘How should humans and AI work together?’” BlockSec co-founder Yajin Zhou said.
items.title_zh: “取代人类还很遥远”：BlockSec 在人工智能审计方面向 EVMBench 发起挑战
items.summary_zh: “真正的问题不是‘人工智能可以取代人类吗？’而是‘人类和人工智能应该如何合作？’”BlockSec 联合创始人周亚金说。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 的更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Codex 安全性不包括 SAST 报告
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨为什么 Codex Security 不依赖传统的 SAST，而是使用人工智能驱动的约束推理和验证来发现真正的漏洞，并减少误报。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.title_zh: 设计人工智能代理以抵抗即时注入
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 如何通过限制危险行为和保护代理工作流程中的敏感数据来防御即时注入和社会工程。

items.title: What's New in Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite Libraries Release
items.title_zh: Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite 库版本的新增功能

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Every Dimension
items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations
items.title_zh: 将机器人人工智能引入嵌入式平台：数据集记录、VLA 微调和设备上优化

items.title: Introducing Modular Diffusers - Composable Building Blocks for Diffusion Pipelines
items.title_zh: 引入模块化扩散器 - 用于扩散管道的可组合构建块

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能时代开源安全的最新投资
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
items.summary: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.
items.title_zh: 询问技术专家：人工智能如何理解我的视觉搜索？
items.summary_zh: 详细了解搜索中用于视觉搜索的 AI 模式的查询扇出方法。

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
items.summary_zh: AI 模式下的 Canvas 现已可供美国所有人使用，此外，它现在还可以帮助您起草文档或构建交互式工具。

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: Learn more about Google DeepMind’s Project Genie and how to write prompts to create your own worlds.
items.title_zh: 利用这 4 个技巧在 Project Genie 中创建新世界
items.summary_zh: 详细了解 Google DeepMind 的 Project Genie 以及如何编写提示来创建您自己的世界。

items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meets people’s needs.
items.title_zh: AI的正确道路是什么？
items.summary_zh: 会议发言人讨论了人工智能的发展轨迹以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的好处。

items.title: Sustaining diplomacy amid competition in US-China relations
items.summary: At MIT, former U.S. ambassador to China Nicholas Burns highlights climate change as an area for diplomatic engagement, while exploring areas including China's emphasis on STEM education.
items.title_zh: 中美关系竞争中的可持续外交
items.summary_zh: 在麻省理工学院，前美国驻华大使尼古拉斯·伯恩斯强调气候变化是外交接触的一个领域，同时探讨了包括中国对 STEM 教育的重视等领域。

items.title: 3 Questions: On the future of AI and the mathematical and physical sciences
items.summary: Professor Jesse Thaler describes a vision for a two-way bridge between artificial intelligence and the mathematical and physical sciences — one that promises to advance both.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：关于人工智能以及数学和物理科学的未来
items.summary_zh: 杰西·塞勒教授描述了在人工智能与数学和物理科学之间架起一座双向桥梁的愿景——这一桥梁有望推动两者的发展。

items.title: New MIT class uses anthropology to improve chatbots
items.summary: MIT computer science students design AI chatbots to help young users become more social, and socially confident.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新课程利用人类学来改进聊天机器人
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机科学专业的学生设计人工智能聊天机器人，帮助年轻用户变得更加社交和社交自信。

items.title: A better method for planning complex visual tasks
items.summary: A new hybrid system could help robots navigate in changing environments or increase the efficiency of multirobot assembly teams.
items.title_zh: 规划复杂视觉任务的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 新的混合系统可以帮助机器人在不断变化的环境中导航或提高多机器人装配团队的效率。
